_readme: Render recipe (starcomb resolution: CLI > this file > GENERIC). Tracks the generic pipeline; pin a knob here only with a measured, dataset-specific reason.

notes.solve: blind solve grinds on this 2.5-degree field (narrow-field index scales); solve with the position hint: solve_field.py --ra=270.8 --dec=-23.9 --radius-deg=10 (an offline narrow-field solver complement, BACKLOG, is the structural fix)
notes.spcc: sensor-null K R0.370/G0.912/B1.000 on 1862/5014 stars — the strong R down-scale is the L-Pro passband on an Ha-rich field. Grounding SPCC in the real train (-oscsensor 'Sony IMX571' -oscfilter 'Optolong L-Pro') is measured IMMATERIAL on this class: K deltas <=1.5%, output pixel deltas p50 <=5e-6 / p99 <=2.6e-4 of full scale — the null default stands, nothing pinned.
notes.filters: no FILTER keywords in any header: filter identity is directory-only; flats/ and darkflats/ are per-set staging symlinks (flats_lpro, biases)
